info.description: Self-hosted, multi-tenant authentication and authorization service. Provides JWT-based auth, RBAC, API keys, audit logging, and webhook event delivery.
info.title: UniAuth API

get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user's organization. Key prefixes are shown; full keys are never returned after creation.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The full plaintext key is returned only in this response — store it securely.

delete.description: Immediately revokes the specified API key. All subsequent requests using this key will be rejected.

get.description: Returns audit log entries for the authenticated user's organization, with optional filters.

post.description: Validates credentials and returns a JWT access token and a refresh token.
Revokes the provided refresh token and blacklists the current access token.
Revokes all active sessions for the authenticated user and blacklists the current access token.

put.description: Changes the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification.

post.description: Validates the one-time reset token and sets a new password.
Sends a password reset link to the user's email. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new token pair. The old refresh token is invalidated.
Creates a new organization and its first admin user in a single atomic operation.
post.summary: Register a new organization and admin user

get.description: Returns the organization associated with the authenticated user's JWT.

put.description: Updates the name of the authenticated user's organization.

get.description: Returns all roles defined within the authenticated user's organization.

post.description: Creates a new RBAC role within the authenticated user's organization.

get.description: Returns all system-level permissions that can be assigned to roles.

put.description: Updates the name and/or description of an existing role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a role from the organization.

post.description: Replaces the permission set of the specified role with the provided list.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users in the authenticated user's organization.
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Updates the full name and/or email of the currently authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the profile of a specific user within the organization.

delete.description: Marks the specified user as inactive. Deactivated users cannot log in.

post.description: Grants the specified role to the target user within the organization.
post.summary: Assign a role to a user

get.description: Returns all webhook endpoints configured for the authenticated user's organization.

post.description: Registers a new webhook endpoint. The HMAC signing secret is returned only in this response — store it securely.

put.description: Updates the URL, event subscriptions, and/or active status of a webhook.

delete.description: Permanently removes the specified webhook endpoint.

get.description: Returns 200 OK when the server process is running. Used by Kubernetes liveness probes.
Checks database and Redis connectivity. Returns 503 if either dependency is unavailable.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by your JWT access token. Example: "Bearer eyJhbGci..."
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Registration, login, token management, and password operations
tags.name: Auth

tags.description: User profile and user management within an organization
tags.name: Users
